name: Upside- Down Peanut Butter Cups
recipeIngredient: 1 cup instant nonfat dry milk powder
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix peanut butter and honey in a bowl.
2. Add milk powder and stir until well mixed.
3. Pinch off walnut-sized pieces of the mixture and roll into balls.
4. Stick the point of a chocolate kiss into each ball.
5. Cover with wrap and refrigerate for 1 hour.
6. Enjoy!
